title: H₂ Production Chain
description: Understand the complete lifecycle of green hydrogen from water electrolysis to storage and distribution. A macroscopic view of the infrastructure.

title: Hydrogen Recycling Process
description: Learn about the technologies used to recover, purify, and recompress unconsumed hydrogen from industrial exhaust gases.

title: Electrolyzer Technologies
description: Compare PEM, Alkaline, and AEM core technologies. Analyze efficiency parameters, operational lifespans, and ideal industrial use cases.

title: Compression Systems
description: Explore mechanical and non-mechanical compression methods necessary for high-density hydrogen storage and grid injection.
